_exempt: <!-- PRIMARY-SOURCE-EXEMPT: reason=QA cert fixture grounded in Wildberger (2005) Divine Proportions ISBN 978-0-9757492-0-8 (Pythagoras subfamily b=1) and Hardy+Wright (2008) ISBN 978-0-19-921986-5 Ch.III (Ford circles/Farey). -->
description: Pythagoras chain (b=1): (1,1)...(1,6). Farey-adjacent since |1*(e+1)-1*e|=1. Curvatures 2,8,18,32,50,72 strictly increasing. Ford circles converge to cusp 0.
